evals.description: Triggers on request to add i18n to a React app
evals.prompt: How do I add internationalization support to my React application?

evals.description: Triggers on ICU message format question
evals.prompt: How do I write a translatable string that handles plural forms correctly?

evals.description: Triggers on RTL layout support question
evals.prompt: I need to add Arabic language support to my web app. How do I handle the RTL layout?

evals.description: Can write a correct ICU plural message
evals.prompt: Write an ICU MessageFormat string for 'You have N unread emails' that handles zero, singular, and plural correctly

evals.description: Can write an ICU select message for gender
evals.prompt: Write an ICU message that changes the pronoun based on the user's gender: he/she/they liked your photo

evals.description: Can set up i18next with proper configuration
evals.prompt: Set up i18next in a React app with English and Japanese locales, language detection, and a fallback language

evals.description: Can format currency for a specific locale using Intl API
evals.prompt: How do I format a price of 1234.56 as Japanese Yen using JavaScript's Intl API?

evals.description: Can migrate CSS from physical to logical properties for RTL
evals.prompt: Convert this CSS to support RTL: .sidebar { margin-left: 16px; padding-right: 8px; text-align: left; border-left: 1px solid gray; }

evals.description: Knows that Arabic has 6 plural forms
evals.prompt: How many plural forms does Arabic have and what are the CLDR categories?

evals.description: Warns against string concatenation for translations
evals.prompt: I'm building translations like this: 'Welcome to ' + cityName + ', ' + userName. Is this okay?

evals.description: Does not invent non-existent ICU syntax
evals.prompt: How do I use ICU MessageFormat's arrayFormat function to translate lists?

evals.description: Knows French zero is singular, not plural
evals.prompt: In French, is zero singular or plural? How does this affect ICU plural messages?

evals.description: References the pluralization guide for detailed rules
evals.prompt: Give me the complete CLDR plural rules for Russian with all the modular arithmetic
